title: feat: support worker threads
summary: Copies `src/mastra/public/` files to `.mastra/output/` during `mastra dev`, bringing dev mode to parity with production builds (`mastra build`) which already call `copyPublic()`. Adds a `public-files-copier` Rollup plugin that watches the public directory and re-copies on rebuild. Changes are confined to 4 files in `packages/cli/src/commands/dev/`: DevBundler.ts (new copyPublic override + plugin), dev.ts (pass mastraDir to DevBundler), the test file (8 new test cases), and a changeset.
maintainerNotes: Well-scoped community contribution that fixes a real gap: public files (e.g. worker thread scripts) weren't available during `mastra dev`. The implementation overrides `copyPublic` in DevBundler with an ENOENT guard, adds a Rollup plugin for watching/copying, and passes `mastraDir` through the constructor. CodeRabbit left several review comments across 4 rounds (mostly nits and one about consistent mastraDir fallback between prepare and watch). CI checks are stuck in PENDING state (Core, E2E, Memory, RAG, etc.) — these appear to be awaiting secrets/authorization for the external contributor fork. No human maintainer has reviewed yet. The changeset incorrectly uses 'mastra' instead of '@mastra/cli' as the package name. 6 commits total.
